data.current_description: Allows integrated partners to submit reviews to Publons.
data.description_suggestion: Allows integrated partners to submit reviews to Publons. Accepts review data including content, ratings, and metadata. Requires token-based authentication. Returns the created review object with assigned ID and timestamp. The submitted review is immediately stored in the Publons platform.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear and action-oriented. Description lacks details about expected input structure (what review data is required), what is returned (review object with ID), and side effects (review is stored/published). Added these details for better AI agent understanding of when and how to use this operation.
